name: brevo-helper
description: Unofficial Codex plugin for planning Brevo campaigns and building website/backend integrations without sending from Codex.

interface.longDescription: Use Codex to set up Brevo Helper authentication, plan Brevo drip campaigns, draft marketing messages, QA campaign assets, and build website/backend lead-capture integrations. This plugin is designed for Brevo dashboard handoff and does not send, schedule, or launch messages from Codex. It is unofficial and is not made by or endorsed by Brevo.
defaultPrompt: Connect this form to Brevo safely.
Build a Brevo drip campaign plan.
